description_long: This object is a cylindrical, handheld flashlight with a robust, metallic body and a slightly flared head housing a circular lens. The main body is smooth with subtle ridges for grip, and a small, raised switch is visible along the side for operation. The head of the flashlight is wider than the shaft, with a transparent lens covering the light source. The tail end is flat, allowing the flashlight to stand upright, and the overall finish is dark, likely black or deep gray, with a glossy sheen. The construction suggests durability, suitable for outdoor or emergency use. The object is compact and portable, designed for easy carrying and one-handed operation.
description: A compact, cylindrical handheld flashlight with a metallic, glossy black finish and a flared lens head. Features a side switch and durable construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular lens and flared head of the flashlight.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cylindrical body, side switch, and overall length.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat tail end and the tapering body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the body and switch from the other side.
